elements.headline: Raycast Pricing: Free Forever or Pro with AI for $8/month

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Core features, including: Clipboard History, Quicklinks, Calculator, Snippets, Window Management + more

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: All Free features plus AI, Cloud Sync, Custom Themes, and Advanced AI models

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Shared commands, quicklinks, and snippets for team collaboration

plans.name: Team Pro

plans.name: Enterprise
